events.name: Seattle FIFA Fan Festival
events.notes: Official FIFA fan zone. Live music, food vendors, giant screen, interactive activations.

events.notes: Community watch party. Street food nearby. Walking distance to Lumen Field.

events.name: Lumen Field Matchday Experience
events.notes: Inside the stadium. Bag policy: clear bags only. No outside food/drink.

events.notes: Neighborhood event. Bring your own chair. Details TBA.
